description_for_human: Access 50+ free AI tools for students and professionals. Merge PDFs, fix grammar, write essays, and more.
description_for_model: ToolNova provides a suite of 50+ free AI-powered tools for productivity, writing, and study assistance. Capabilities include PDF manipulation (merge, split), text processing (summarize, paraphrase, grammar check), and content generation (essays, flashcards). Use the '/api/tools' endpoint to discover available tools and their metadata. The site is a frontend wrapper around these tools.
